title: Gardish
subTitle: Purshottam, a policeman, wishes for his son, Shiva, to become a police inspector. However, when he gets attacked by mobsters, the latter resorts to violence and crime.

title: Mastana
subTitle: Satya, a poor man, befriends a rich but neglected child, but her parents resent their friendship and force him to leave. However, when she falls gravely ill, they ask Satya to return.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
subTitle: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

title: Akayla
subTitle: Inspector Vijay Verma captures the criminal mastermind Jojo. However, Jojo escapes from jail and kills Vijay's friends as revenge.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Maqsad
subTitle: Rajeshwar is the only son of a wealthy industrialist, while Tilak hails from a poor family. When Rajeshwar's father is murdered and the blame falls on Tilak, he must strive to prove his innocence.

title: Seeta Aur Geeta
subTitle: Identical twins who were separated at birth, lead different lives, wherein one is abused by her aunt, the other turns out to be street smart. However, things take a turn when they reconnect and decide to swap places.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

title: Meherbaan
subTitle: Ravi promises his father on his deathbed that he will take care of Chaurangilal's family whenever the need arises. However, a cunning Chaurangilal, concocts a plan to leave Ravi bankrupt and take over his wealth.

title: Bhrashtachar
subTitle: Journalist Bhavani intends to expose and bring to justice a corrupt politician who pretends to be a social worker. However, she soon finds herself trapped in a web of conspiracies.

title: Bhrashtachar
subTitle: Journalist Bhavani intends to expose and bring to justice a corrupt politician who pretends to be a social worker. However, she soon finds herself trapped in a web of conspiracies.

title: Ghulam
subTitle: Siddharth, a boxer, rebels against Raunak, a local gangster, when the latter kills his friend but Jai, Siddharth's brother, does not encourage his actions.

subTitle: Sony MAX2 EPG

title: Dil Tera Aashiq
subTitle: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

title: Aag
subTitle: A young man seeks a fresh start in a village after enduring tragedy, only to find himself entangled in a conflict that tests his strength and sense of justice.

title: Dil Hai Betaab
subTitle: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry. However, when her father's employer asks for Meena's hand in marriage, he accepts his proposal and ruins his daughter's life.

title: Shola Aur Shabnam
subTitle: Divya loves Karan and plans to get married to him. However, a notorious gangster's brother, Bali, who also has his eyes on her, goes to great lengths to destroy her relationship with Karan.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Sadak
subTitle: A young man who falls in love with a sex worker must overcome the social stigma as well as face the brothel owner and some criminal elements.

title: Anari
subTitle: Rama, a simpleton, is appointed as the bodyguard of Rajnandini, a rich girl. She soon falls in love with him but her brothers' violent nature gets in the way of her uniting with Rama.

title: Duniya
subTitle: An advocate, tasked with defending the brother of his love interest in court, grapples with a mounting challenge as incriminating evidence accumulates against his client.
